title: Lawnmower Man 2: Beyond Cyberspace
tagline: God made him simple. Science made him a god. Now, he wants revenge.
overview: Now a shattered mind lurking in cyberspace, Jobe plots a return by hijacking a global VR network and rebuilding himself as something far beyond human. As reality starts to glitch, a small group races to stop a digital god who no longer needs a body.
